nodes.name: Webhook: New Listing
nodes.notes: POST /webhook/sync-listing. Body: { raw_text: string }. Called by the dashboard's 'Add property' sheet OR by a CSV processor.

nodes.name: Gemini: Extract Fields
nodes.notes: EXPRESSION MODE on jsonBody (fx). The Code node above built a complete JSON string in geminiBody; this node sends it as-is.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_project_name: $json.project_name, p_developer: $json.developer, p_city: $json.city, p_locality: $json.locality, p_config: $json.config, p_price_min_lakhs: $json.price_min_lakhs, p_price_max_lakhs: $json.price_max_lakhs, p_carpet_area_sqft: $json.carpet_area_sqft, p_rera_number: $json.rera_number, p_possession_date: $json.possession_date, p_amenities: $json.amenities, p_highlights: $json.highlights, p_status: $json.status }) }}

nodes.name: Supabase: Upsert Property (RPC)
nodes.notes: v2 (audit items 1.1, 1.2): calls upsert_property RPC from migration 0006. The RPC returns an array with one row: { id, action_taken: 'insert' | 'update_by_rera' | 'update_by_fuzzy', matched_on }. Downstream nodes read property_id from $('Supabase: Upsert Property (RPC)').first().json[0].id

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ JSON.stringify({ property_id: $('Supabase: Upsert Property (RPC)').first().json[0].id, action_taken: $('Supabase: Upsert Property (RPC)').first().json[0].action_taken, matched_on: $('Supabase: Upsert Property (RPC)').first().json[0].matched_on, project_name: $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.project_name, city: $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.city, rera_present: !!$('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.rera_number, review_needed: $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.review_needed, review_reason: $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.review_reason, confidence_by_field: $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.confidence_by_field, status: $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.status }) }}

={{ $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.project_name + ' (' + $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.city + ') ' + $('Supabase: Upsert Property (RPC)').first().json[0].action_taken + '. Confidence ' + ($('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.confidence_overall || '?') + '. RERA ' + ($('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.rera_number || 'missing') + ($('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.review_needed ? '. NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW' : '') }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, property_id: $('Supabase: Upsert Property (RPC)').first().json[0].id, action_taken: $('Supabase: Upsert Property (RPC)').first().json[0].action_taken, matched_on: $('Supabase: Upsert Property (RPC)').first().json[0].matched_on, project_name: $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.project_name, city: $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.city, rera_present: !!$('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.rera_number, confidence_overall: $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.confidence_overall, review_needed: $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.review_needed, review_reason: $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.review_reason, trace_id: $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.traceId, fields_extracted: 13 } }}
={{ { ok: false, error: $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.error, extracted: $('Code: Parse & Validate').first().json.extracted } }}
